title: how to schedule meeting with developer team
excerpt:
Hi, 
We have developed an frontend App to deploy in marketplace. 
We just want to clarify the App submission documents. Could you please guide us to schedule the call with the experts? 
Thanks in advance!

posts.author: Priya (Priyadharshini)
